description: Python script calling yaml.load() without a safe Loader, which is the vulnerable pattern for CVE-2020-14343 and CVE-2020-1747 in PyYAML 5.3. No automated reachability tool exists for Python, but static analysis of the source shows direct use of the unsafe function.

findings.human_justification: yaml.load() is called without a safe Loader argument, which allows arbitrary Python object deserialization. This is the exact vulnerable pattern.
yaml.load() is called without a safe Loader, which triggers the full_load behavior vulnerable to CVE-2020-1747.
